rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Download from Wordpress URL
id: 61bcccfe-8d5d-4e3d-9c46-10eb5faf02d4
description: Suspicious download from likely Wordpress page
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson
date: '2021-11-02'
modified: '2024-02-08'
references:
- None
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-uri|endswith:
    - .exe
    - .vbs
    - .bat
    - .rar
    - .ps1
    - .pptm
    - .rtf
    - .hta
    - .dll
    - .ws
    - .wsf
    - .sct
    - .bin
    - .sh
    c-uri|startswith: /wp-
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate files hosted on Wordpress pages
level: medium
tags:
- attack.command_and_control
